source_pr.title: distsql: make behavior of `TableHandlesToKVRanges` correct.
source_pr.body:
current master cannot pass the added test.
PTAL @zz-jason @lamxTyler @XuHuaiyu

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select * from t use index(idx) order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1 1", "9223372036854775807 2 2")) (executor/distsql_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select * from t use index(idx) order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1 1", "9223372036854775807 2 2")) (executor/distsql_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select * from t use index(idx) order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1 1", "9223372036854775807 2 2")) (executor/distsql_test.go)
